name: create_comment
description: Add a comment to an existing Linear issue. Comments support Markdown formatting and are used for discussion, updates, and collaboration on issues. You need the issue's UUID to post a comment. The comment will be visible to all issue subscribers.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL mutation string to create a comment on an issue.
parameters.example: mutation { commentCreate(input: { issueId: "issue-uuid", body: "Comment text" }) { success comment { id body } } }

parameters.name: issueId
parameters.description: The UUID of the issue to comment on.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The comment text in Markdown format.
parameters.example: I've identified the root cause. The SAML response parser is timing out due to a misconfigured certificate validation step.

body.query: mutation CommentCreate($input: CommentCreateInput!) { commentCreate(input: $input) { success comment { id body createdAt user { name } issue { identifier } } } }

input.body: I've identified the root cause. The SAML response parser is timing out due to a misconfigured certificate validation step.

comment.body: I've identified the root cause. The SAML response parser is timing out due to a misconfigured certificate validation step.
